title: Validate bead auto-commit behavior with tests
description: Add and run targeted tests covering per-write commits, creation/update/deletion commit messages, best-effort git failure handling, and concurrent write safety for the combined storage change set.
acceptance_criteria: Automated tests verify that creating and updating a bead produce git commits with the expected message format.
Automated tests verify bead deletion is committed immediately.
Automated tests verify git errors or no-op commit scenarios do not propagate exceptions from storage writes.
Automated tests exercise concurrent bead writes sufficiently to catch git serialization regressions.
The relevant existing test suite passes after the new tests are added.
